arts.ttl: Lens near agreement to sign former Arsenal and Brighton goalkeeper Mathew Ryan
arts.sum: Lens are nearing an agreement to sign Australia international goalkeeper Mathew Ryan (32), according to a report from L’Equipe. Will Still’s Artois side were in the market for a goalkeeper…

arts.ttl: Liverpool's late show, Arsenal's implosion: Was Saturday the title race's defining day?
arts.sum: At 4.48pm on Saturdy, Arsenal had hope of catching Liverpool. By the end of the day, Arne Slot's men had one hand on the trophy. Was this the defining day in the title race?

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta admits 'something is missing' in Arsenal's attack as he bemoans Gunner stars for letting two-goal lead slip against Aston Villa
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN AT THE EMIRATES: Mikel Arteta admitted 'something is missing' in his Arsenal team as they blew a two-goal lead to draw against Aston Villa on Saturday evening.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes feelings clear in pointed message to Arsenal chiefs after Aston Villa blow
arts.sum: Arsenal's lack of squad depth was exposed as Aston Villa came from 2-0 down to draw in the Premier League on Saturday against an injury-depleted side at the Emirates Stadium

arts.ttl: Arsenal's lack of depth sees them slip in Premier League title race
arts.sum: Arsenal's failure to defeat Aston Villa evokes the reality of the Gunners' lack of squad depth to compete for the Premier League title.

arts.ttl: Louie Barry fits the Celtic mould of fan favourite as Aston Villa insider delivers glowing reference
arts.sum: The 21-year-old is on Brendan Rodgers' wishlist as he looks to add to his ranks in this window

arts.ttl: Amadou Onana injury update as Unai Emery confirms fresh Aston Villa blow
arts.sum: Amadou Onana suffered a suspected hamstring injury in Aston Villa's 2-2 draw against Arsenal. After full-time, Unai Emery was asked about Onana's injury and said: "I don’t know exactly.

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank sends blunt title declaration as Arsenal true colours shown
arts.sum: Brentford manager Thomas Frank has admitted that he believes Liverpool are a level above Arsenal and are 'huge favourites' to win the Premier League. If Brentford had denied Liverpool, Arsenal would have had the chance to reduce the deficit in the title race to two points with a win over Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Liverpool's next six fixtures after huge late twists in Premier League title race
arts.sum: Liverpool moved six points clear of Arsenal at the top of the Premier League after Darwin Nunez's dramatic late brace combined with Aston Villa's comeback at the Emirates Stadium

arts.ttl: The Arsenal substitution that might explain their crumbling title bid
arts.sum: Arsenal 2-2 Aston Villa: Gabriel Martinelli and Kai Havertz fired the Gunners in front but Villa fought back through goals from Youri Tielemans and Ollie Watkins in eight second-half minutes
